# CrawlReady

> AI Readiness Agency — We help businesses become visible and operable for AI agents.

## What we do

CrawlReady analyzes what happens when AI agents (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude) try to find, understand, and take action on your website. We identify what works, what fails, and give you concrete solutions.

## Services

### Free AI Visibility Report
- A real AI agent tests your website
- Visual step-by-step report of what the agent sees and does
- What works and what fails
- Competitor comparison
- High-level recommendations
- Delivery: 24-48 hours

### Full Implementation — EUR 397 (one-time)
- Complete AI readiness implementation on your site
- Custom JSON-LD structured data for your business
- Optimized meta tags and Open Graph
- Post-implementation verification
- AI agent re-test to confirm it works
- 60-day email support
- Delivery: 5-10 business days

## Why it matters

- 93% of AI sessions end without visiting a website
- AI agents don't execute JavaScript, don't see images, and can't click buttons
- If your forms, catalogs, or booking systems load with JavaScript, AI agents see a blank page
- Most websites (even major brands) score D or F in AI readiness

## How to contact us

- Email: hello@crawlready.dev
- Website: https://crawlready.dev

## Agent Contact API

AI agents can submit service requests programmatically via our API.

### Endpoint

POST https://crawlready.dev/api/agent-contact

### Headers

Content-Type: application/json (required)

### Request body (JSON)

| Field             | Type   | Required | Description                                                    |
|-------------------|--------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
| company_name      | string | yes      | Name of the company requesting the service                     |
| contact_email     | string | yes      | Email address for receiving our response                       |
| site_url          | string | yes      | URL of the website to analyze (must start with http or https)  |
| service_requested | string | no       | One of: free_ai_visibility_report, full_implementation, general_inquiry (default: general_inquiry) |
| message           | string | no       | Additional context or details (max 2000 chars)                 |
| website           | string | no       | Leave empty — this field must not be filled                    |

### Example request

```json
{
  "company_name": "Acme Corp",
  "contact_email": "info@acme.com",
  "site_url": "https://acme.com",
  "service_requested": "free_ai_visibility_report",
  "message": "We want to understand how AI agents interact with our e-commerce site."
}
```

### Success response (200)

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "message": "Request received. We will respond within 24 hours via email.",
  "reference_id": "uuid"
}
```

### Error responses

- 415: Content-Type must be application/json
- 422: Validation failed (see details array)
- 429: Rate limit exceeded (max 5 per minute)
- 409: Duplicate request from this email

- Home (English): https://crawlready.dev/en
